Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.437

Title: Extends provisions authorizing hunting big game by rifle in the county of Tompkins
Summary: Extends provisions authorizing hunting big game by rifle in the county of Tompkins until 2028.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 152 of the laws of 2020 amending the environmental conservation law relating to authorizing hunting big game by rifle in the county of Tompkins, in relation to extending the effectiveness thereof
